title: 2009 Salford City Reds season
wikitext:
[[Salford Red Devils|Salford City Reds]] competed in their [[Super League XIV|eleventh Super League]] season in their 137th year. They also competed in the [[2009 Challenge Cup]].

{{Note label|test|A|A}}Note A: Match between Salford City Reds and Catalans Dragons was postponed to 7 August 2009 due to a test between [[England national rugby league team|England]] and [[France national rugby league team|France]] in [[Paris]] over the same weekend, in which ten Catalans players were involved.<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2009/jun/10/salford-wigan-rob-parker|title=Salford's Rob Parker fractured skull during defeat by Wigan, say club|publisher=([[guardian.co.uk]])|accessdate=2009-06-11| location=London | date=2009-06-10}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://news.bbc.co.uk/sport1/hi/rugby_league/8093909.stm
|title=France 12-66 England|publisher=news.bbc.co.uk (BBC Sport)|access-date=2009-06-14| date=2009-06-13| archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20090614012919/http://news.bbc.co.uk/sport1/hi/rugby_league/8093909.stm| archive-date= 14 June 2009 <!--DASHBot-->| url-status= live}}</ref>
